title: hibbertia stricta subsp. stricta
intro: Hibbertia stricta subsp. stricta, also known as Guinea flower, is a native Australian plant species belonging to the Dilleniaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hibbertia stricta subsp. stricta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
